findings.jp: 経営戦略マネジメント
findings.issue: EN tautological 'Management Strategy Management' — literal gloss of 経営=Management + 戦略=Strategy + マネジメント=Management produces redundant doubled 'Management'. Awkward as chapter title.
findings.recommended_fix: Use 'Business Strategy Management' or 'Strategic Management' (latter is the standard MBA-domain term).
